converter.title: Converter EPUB ➜ TXT
note.1: When importing a .txt file, the content must follow this structure:
note.2:
1. STRUCTURE TAGS 
 <>...</> → Title (novel title)
 <info> ... </info> → Novel information (author, description, genre, etc.)
[ ... ] → Character list
<list> ... </list> → Chapter list
{ ... } → Chapter content
 • → System checker / marker (do not remove, chapter content must be inside this marker)
note.3:
2. RULES (MANDATORY)
Do not edit, delete, or modify any MDT tags.
All file content must keep the original structure.
System tags are required.
If format is incorrect, the tool may fail to read the content.
note.4:
3. FILE REQUIREMENT
The tool works completely offline
Users must prepare a properly formatted .txt file themselves
The tool only supports files converted using MDT standard format
note.5:
4. DISCLAIMER
If the file breaks due to incorrect formatting, the tool is not responsible
The tool does not guarantee reading files from non-MDT sources
Only files created by the tool or properly designed MDT-compliant files are recommended
